title: perityle pseudociliata
intro: Perityle pseudociliata, also known as "Desert Marigold," is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Perityle pseudociliata include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and soothe skin irritations. Perityle pseudociliata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
